title: aster kyobuntensis
intro: Aster kyobuntensis, also known as Kyobun-tsubaki, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of wild aster plant that is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, colds, and digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, Aster kyobuntensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical cream or ointment to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
